problem: Why does biological neural computation use 20W while AI uses megawatts — what is different?
hypothesis: Homomorphic encryption for private computation may resolve Why does biological neural computation use 20W while AI uses megawatts — what is different? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Comparative ablation study with 2 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
